//: The lowering runs on the Go/ttsc engine during the Bun.build emit (build.ts); this config drives the typecheck/lint and the clean d.ts (`bun x tsc`). The @rhombus-std/di.extras declare-module augmentation enters the program via `types` (a compile-time inclusion, never a runtime import), so the authored add<I>()/addFactory<I>() forms type-check without any transformer plugin — `nameof` and the tokenless forms are ordinary members with no type-level footprint. @rhombus-std/di + di.extras are dist-referenced (§72), so their `types` conditions resolve the built d.ts directly — di's source can't co-compile once the authoring augmentation is merged in, exactly as a published consumer's setup. module:ESNext keeps relative .js specifiers verbatim so node ESM resolves the emitted dist at runtime; moduleResolution:Bundler maps them back to source at compile time.
